Registry / Terms / module

module

VIMLFull match — VIML 2022 G 18 #00584 · 12 instances

Authoritative definition

VIML 2022 Latest · concept #4.04view ↗

identifiable part of a {{0.10,measuring instrument}} or of a {{4.02,family of measuring instruments}} that performs a specific function or functions and that can be separately evaluated according to prescribed metrological and technical performance requirements as specified in the relevant Recommendation

  • VIML 2022 · #4.04
    identifiable part of a {{0.10,measuring instrument}} or of a {{4.02,family of measuring instruments}} that performs a specific function or functions and that can be separately evaluated according to prescribed metrological and technical performance requirements as specified in the relevant Recommendation

Suggested actions

  1. MEDIUM 11 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

12 distinct definitions across 12 publications.

12 unique definitions (each used by only one publication)

Ed.YearPublicationClauseG 18 #Definition
202X2011OIML R106-1:20110.2.602544
(no definition recorded)
pending
202X2013OIML D011:20133.202216
device performing a specific function or functions and (usually) manufactured and constructed such that it can be separately evaluated according to prescribed metrological and technical performance requirements
pending
202X2021OIML R060-1:2021A.1.203407
device performing a specific function or functions and (usually) manufactured and constructed such that it can be separately evaluated according to prescribed metrological and technical performance requirements (OIML D11, 3.2)
pending
202X2017OIML R061:20173.3.1103673
identifiable part of a measuring instrument or of a family of measuring instruments that performs a specific function or functions and that can be separately evaluated according to prescribed metrological and technical performance requirements as specified in th relevant Recommendation (VIML, 4.04) Example: Typical modules of a weighing instrument are weighing module, load cell, indicator, analog or digital data processing device, terminal, primary display.
pending
20102003OIML B 3:20032.400082
identifiable part of a measuring instrument or of a family of measuring instruments that performs a specific function or functions and that can be separately evaluated according to prescribed metrological and technical performance requirements in the relevant Recommendation
pending
20102007OIML R 107-1:2007T.2.701341
identifiable part of an instrument or device that performs a specific function or functions, and that can be separately cell evaluated according to the metrological and technical weig performance requirements in the relevant Recommendation. The modules of a weighing instrument are subject to specified partial error limits
pending
202X2007OIML R 107-1:2007T.2.701341
identifiable part of an instrument or device that performs a specific function or functions, and that can be separately evaluated according to the metrological and technical performance requirements in the relevant Recommendation. The modules of a weighing instrument are subject to specified partial error limits
pending
202X2006OIML R 76-1:2006T.2.200896
identifiable part of an instrument that performs a specific function or functions, and that can be separately evaluated according to specific metrological and technical performance requirements in the relevant Recommendation. The modules of a weighing instrument are subject to specified partial error limits
pending
202X2006OIML R 51-1:2006T.2.700584
identifiable part of an instrument that performs a specific function or functions, and that can be separately evaluated according to the metrological and technical performance requirements in the relevant Recommendation. The modules of a weighing instrument are subject to specified partial error limits
pending
20102006OIML R 76-1:2006T.2.200896
identifiable part of an instrument that performs a specific function or functions, and that can be separately evaluated are according to specific metrological and technical performance pro requirements in the relevant Recommendation. The modules of a primary weighing instrument are subject to specified partial error limits
pending
20102006OIML R 51-1:2006T.2.700584
identifiable part of an instrument that performs a specific function or functions, and that can be separately evaluated ins according to the metrological and technical performance dig requirements in the relevant Recommendation. The modules of a termina weighing instrument are subject to specified partial error limits
pending
202X2020OIML R150-1:20202.2.803319
identifiable part of an measuring instrument or family of measuring instruments that performs a specific function or functions, and that can be separately evaluated according to the prescribed metrological and technical performance requirements in the relevant Recommendation [VIML;2013, 4.04]
